title: WokFlows Lite
description: The WoK-Flows Lite 64x Resource Pack is a performance-optimized version of the WoK-Flows pack, designed to deliver smooth gameplay while maintaining high-quality visuals. Perfect for players on lower-end systems or those who prefer faster performance.
body:
The WoK-Flows LITE Resource Pack is designed to enhance the World of Keralis server with high-quality, detailed textures and improved performance. Available in HD 128x and Lite 64x versions. This x64 pack offers flexibility for players, providing a visually stunning experience with more optimized performance for smoother gameplay.

The Lite 64x version ensures faster performance, ideal for lower-end systems or players who prioritize speed without sacrificing too much visual quality.

_**We also offer a one-click install modpack through modrinth with performance enhancing mods**_ **[here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wokpack/version/latest).**
